nasb.text: So now let us make a covenant with our God to put away all the wives and their children, according to the counsel of my lord and of those who tremble at the commandment of our God; and let it be done according to the law.

esv.text: Therefore let us make a covenant with our God to put away all these wives and their children, according to the counsel of my lord and of those who tremble at the commandment of our God, and let it be done according to the Law.

cnv.text: 現在，我們應當與我們的　神立約，按著我主和那些因我們　神的誡命而戰兢的人所議定的，照著律法而行，送走這些妻子和她們所生的兒女。

ccb.text: 现在，我们来与我们的上帝立约，听从你和那些敬畏我们上帝诫命之人的指示，遵照律法而行，送走这些妻子和她们的儿女。
